seed_text: The one thing which we seek with insatiable desire is to forget ourselves, to be surprised out of our propriety
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
here-heal-here: a scent of new dirt and old, jealous skin.
a jaw that bites back, right here where you feel safe.
something green, waiting to take you by surprise.
the sound of a lock breaking, then a bunch of birds going nuts.
